title: Laeliopsis cubensis
taxonomy: Laeliopsis cubensis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. Within the orchid family, Laeliopsis cubensis is further classified as a species within the genus Laeliopsis. The genus Laeliopsis is part of the subtribe Catasetinae, which contains orchids that are known for their unique and often complex floral structures. The subtribe Catasetinae is itself part of the tribe Cataseteae, a group of orchids that are primarily found in the Americas. This classification reflects the unique evolutionary history of Laeliopsis cubensis and its relatives within the orchid family.

It has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help in treating conditions such as infections and wounds.
